title: Moving money using OutboundTransfer objects
excerpt: Learn how to transfer money out of financial accounts to external accounts. An `OutboundTransfer` object facilitates money movement out of a financial account. Use `OutboundTransfer` to send funds over ACH rails or through a domestic wire transfer to an external bank account that a connected account owns. Outbound transfers typically arrive at the receiving bank between the same day and 2 business days, depending on whether you use a wire or ACH. > (Multi FA beta) If enrolled in the Multi FA beta, you can use `OutboundTransfer` to send funds over `stripe` network rails to another financial account associated with the same connected account. Funds arrive in the destination financial account within minutes.…
